schemes.name: PM Gramin Digital Saksharta Abhiyan (PMGDISHA)
schemes.benefit: Free digital literacy training (basic computer, internet, mobile payments) for rural citizens
schemes.benefit_hi: ग्रामीण नागरिकों को मुफ्त डिजिटल साक्षरता प्रशिक्षण
schemes.eligibility: Rural households (one member) who are digital-illiterate

schemes.name: Free Wi-Fi via PM-WANI (Wi-Fi Access Network Interface)
schemes.benefit: Affordable public Wi-Fi at kirana shops, CSCs — near-free for poor users
schemes.benefit_hi: किराना दुकानों/CSC पर किफायती सार्वजनिक Wi-Fi — गरीबों के लिए लगभग मुफ्त
schemes.eligibility: All citizens near PM-WANI access points

schemes.name: BharatNet (Rural Broadband Connectivity)
schemes.benefit: High-speed broadband (100 Mbps) at all Gram Panchayats (2.5 lakh GPs)
schemes.benefit_hi: 2.5 लाख ग्राम पंचायतों में 100 Mbps हाई-स्पीड इंटरनेट
schemes.eligibility: All citizens in Gram Panchayat areas covered by BharatNet

schemes.name: Aadhaar-Enabled Payment System (AEPS)
schemes.benefit: Cash withdrawal, balance enquiry, fund transfer using fingerprint at micro-ATMs — no card needed
schemes.benefit_hi: माइक्रो-ATM पर उंगली की छाप से पैसे निकालें — बिना बैंक जाए

schemes.name: Common Service Centres (CSC) — 5 Lakh Villages
schemes.benefit: 40+ government services (certificates, PAN, passport, insurance, banking) at doorstep
schemes.benefit_hi: गाँव में 40+ सरकारी सेवाएं (प्रमाण पत्र, PAN, बीमा, बैंकिंग)

schemes.name: Digital Locker (DigiLocker)
schemes.benefit: Officially valid digital storage of documents (Aadhaar, degree, driving license, etc.)
schemes.benefit_hi: आधार, डिग्री, लाइसेंस आदि का आधिकारिक डिजिटल भंडारण
schemes.eligibility: All Indian citizens with Aadhaar-linked mobile number

schemes.name: e-Shram Portal (Unorganized Worker Registry)
schemes.benefit: Universal account number for unorganized workers + Rs 2 lakh accident insurance
schemes.benefit_hi: असंगठित कामगारों को UAN + ₹2 लाख दुर्घटना बीमा
schemes.eligibility: Unorganized sector workers (domestic, construction, agriculture, street vendors)

schemes.name: DIKSHA — Digital Content for Teachers & Students
schemes.benefit: Free digital learning content in 30+ Indian languages, NCERT-aligned for all grades
schemes.benefit_hi: 30+ भाषाओं में NCERT-संरेखित मुफ्त डिजिटल शिक्षण सामग्री
schemes.eligibility: All students and teachers across India

schemes.name: Government e-Marketplace (GeM) for Small Sellers
schemes.benefit: Direct access to sell products/services to government agencies — no middlemen
schemes.benefit_hi: बिना बिचौलियों के सरकारी एजेंसियों को सीधे बिक्री
schemes.eligibility: Small businesses, artisans, SHGs, startups registered on GeM

schemes.name: Startup India Recognition (DPIIT)
schemes.benefit: Tax exemption (3 years), faster IP filing, relaxed procurement norms for DPIIT-recognized startups
schemes.benefit_hi: 3 साल टैक्स छूट, तेज IP फाइलिंग, खरीद में छूट
schemes.eligibility: Entities registered < 10 years, turnover < Rs 100 crore, with innovation focus

schemes.name: UMANG App (Unified Mobile Application for New-age Governance)
schemes.benefit: 1,200+ government services on single mobile app (EPFO, Aadhaar, CBSE, PMAY status etc.)
schemes.benefit_hi: एक मोबाइल ऐप में 1,200+ सरकारी सेवाएं
schemes.eligibility: All Indian citizens with a smartphone
documents: Aadhaar or mobile number as applicable per service
